entry.title: IDC FA810606D0001 (ARZ995) awarded to THE BOEING COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THE MODIFICATION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION PERIOD II, INCORPORATE PRICING FOR CLIN 6001, AND TO UPDATE CALENDAR YEAR (CY) 2011 AND 2012 RATE MATRIX FOR IDS - WICHITA (BDS-W), BOEING AEROSPACE OPERATIONS (BAO), AND WIDEBAND COMMUNICATION AND RF SYSTEMS (WCRS) INTO CONTRACT FA8106-06-D-0001.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
